query: A lightful living room, small bedroom and tiny kitchen

objects.description: A modern, light-gray fabric three-seater sofa with clean lines and tapered wooden legs, designed for comfort and a bright aesthetic.
A compact, mid-century style armchair in soft beige with walnut legs, providing a cozy accent seating option.
A rectangular, light oak coffee table with a minimalist frame and smooth finish, complementing the light-toned sofa.
A low, wide media console in white matte finish with two drawers and open shelving, suitable for TV and media storage.
A tall, narrow bookshelf in natural wood finish with five open shelves, ideal for books and decorative items without overwhelming the space.
An adjustable arc floor lamp with a brushed brass finish and white fabric shade, providing ambient lighting over the sofa.
A round side table with a white marble top and gold metal base, placed next to the armchair.
A minimalist wooden platform bed with a light oak finish and clean lines, designed to maximize the sense of space in a small bedroom. Includes integrated low-profile headboard.
A slim, floor-to-ceiling wardrobe with a white matte finish and mirrored sliding doors to enhance light reflection. Includes internal shelves and hanging space, optimized for small rooms.
A set of three staggered wooden wall-mounted shelves in light birch finish, arranged asymmetrically above the bed for visual interest and storage without occupying floor space.
A compact round bedside table with a white finish and natural wood accent top, designed to fit snugly next to the bed without obstructing movement.

objects_on_top.object_name: small ceramic vase with dried flowers

objects.description: A vertical rectangular mirror in a thin black metal frame, mounted on the wall opposite the bed to reflect light and create a sense of depth.
An adjustable swing-arm LED reading light with a brushed nickel finish, installed on the wall beside the bed for task lighting without taking up bedside space.

A modern white glossy floor-mounted kitchen cabinet with integrated handles and soft-close drawers, designed for compact kitchens. Includes lower and upper storage units with clean lines and minimalist hardware.
A durable quartz composite countertop in light gray with a polished finish, extending from the kitchen cabinet for food prep and small appliance placement. Heat-resistant and easy to clean.
A compact wooden kitchen island on casters with open shelf storage underneath and a butcher block top. Designed for small kitchens to add prep space and light storage without permanent installation.

objects_on_top.object_name: small cookbook stand with open recipe book
mini olive oil and vinegar dispenser set

objects.description: A minimalist floating shelf set made of matte black metal and tempered glass, consisting of three staggered shelves for displaying kitchenware and spices. Mounted on the wall above the countertop for space efficiency.

A single-basin stainless steel undermount kitchen sink with a pull-down spray faucet in brushed nickel finish. Compact design suitable for small kitchens with efficient water flow and noise reduction.
